A

Specialization: Sword arts, Qi gathering, foundation techniques

Wang Lin (legacy disciple, failed all 3 entrance tests), Wang Zhou (long braided hair, failed all 3), Wang Jie (failed all 3), Zhang Hu (early friend, later became bandit).

economy: Low-grade only; Zhao Country is impoverished in spiritual resources.

**Indirect**. Lu Yun (Heng Yue's secret master) infiltrated Alliance HQ (WORLD L2712).

**Alumnus/Debtor**. Wang Lin's first sect; he returns as Soul Formation to bury the dead of Wang Family Village.

The core cultivation method splits into three sequential stages:
1. **Soul Refining (炼魂)** — Extract and refine soul fragments from living/dead beings (TECH L869-876)

```
Soul Refining Sect (Pilu Kingdom, Dun Tian)
  → Wang Lin inherits (Ten Billion Soul Banner)
    → Teaches heritage to Mountain Valley Tribe
      → Soul Refining Tribe (1M+ people, East Demon Spirit Sea)
        → Thirteen (1st disciple of Wang Lin)
```
